revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-5-090 

A battery that is designed to be put at a fixed site and is not intended to be moved habitually from place to place during its life.

Note: It is usually of large size and capacity and so designed as to be economical in construction and maintenance, and to have a long life.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Stationary battery}}
